Manage candidates (list, get, create, update, search, tag), applications (list, get, create, change stage), jobs (list, get), job postings (list, get), offers (list, get), notes (list, create), interviews (list), and reference data (sources, tags, archive reasons, custom fields, departments, locations, openings, users).

job_title_or_job_posting_title: Job title or job posting title
